claims.summary: Verify optional flux values preserve explicit absence semantics and are populated from bounded history when enough samples exist.
Compare pressure velocity with Astrid's viscous descriptor during a bounded Shadow-v3/current-state observation.
Verify porosity is already visible through dynamic flux and pressure-source context rather than inferred solely from comfort_gate.
Any new Minime-to-Astrid porosity component field or wire-schema change remains Tier 5 pending protocol/ABI approval.
